title: Add decision_function to LDA / QDA / RidgeClassifier / LogisticRegression / LogisticRegressionCV / LinearSVC / SGDClassifier
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin / linear classifier base provides decision_function(X) returning the raw signed distance from the decision boundary (binary) or per-class scores (multiclass). Used as input to ROC-AUC / precision-recall / calibration.

ferrolearn-linear currently has decision_function on SVC/NuSVC/SVR/NuSVR/OneClassSVM (kernel-based). The linear classifiers don't expose it. Add to the 7 listed estimators returning Array2<F> with shape (n_samples, n_classes) for multiclass and (n_samples, 1) for binary (mirror tree-crate convention).
